name: Shrimp Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 6 egg roll wrappers, cut into 4 squares each
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by mincing the garlic and finely chopping the green onions.
2. Cook the dried mushrooms in a pot of water until softened.
3. Drain the mushrooms and blend them with the shrimp, ground turkey, soy sauce, sesame oil, and hot red pepper sauce until well combined.
4. Place a small amount of filling in the center of each egg roll or wonton wrapper.
5. Brush the edges of the wrappers with non-stick spray.
6. Fold the wrappers to form dumplings, pleating the edges as desired.
7. Steam the dumplings for 10-15 minutes until cooked through and golden brown.
8. Turn off the heat source when finished cooking.
